reasoning: The control 'Implement secure configurations for hardware and software' can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring secure network configurations and pod security standards. Network security can be enforced using NetworkPolicies to deny all ingress and egress traffic by default, which is similar to restricting public access in cloud environments. Additionally, avoiding the use of NodePort services prevents exposing services directly to the internet. Pod security standards can be applied to ensure that pods are configured securely, akin to secure configurations for software.
title: Implement secure configurations for hardware and software
